nodes.label: Optional bridge from /add to the ClubGG deposit bot's remote-trigger HTTP API.
Read env config. Returns None when the feature is not configured.
Map a dashboard clubs.name (+ RT/AT union) to a ClubGG club name.      Round Tab
Stable idempotency key. Bonus is a separate transaction with its own id.
Return (label, chip_amount, request_id_part) for each ClubGG deposit.
Return True if this request_id was newly claimed (not seen recently).
Best-effort staff alert to a configured chat; always logs.
Preflight. Returns (ok, detail). ok=False means do not attempt a deposit.
Poll GET /deposit/<job_id> until terminal/timeout. Returns the last job dict.
Return RT or AT from a stored deposit union; default RT when never chosen.
Pick RT vs AT for Round Table auto chip-add from title prefix and deposit histor
Submit one deposit, poll to terminal, notify. Returns True on success/dry_run/sk
Fire-and-forget orchestration. Safe to schedule with create_task.      Never rai
